reference: HE HAD NOT ONLY PLEADED GUILTY BUT HAD EXPRESSED HIS INTENTION OF REPEATING HIS ESCAPADE IN OTHER DIRECTIONS AS SOON AS CIRCUMSTANCES PERMITTED THROUGHOUT THE TRIAL HE WAS BUSY EXAMINING A SMALL MODEL OF THE FREE TRADE HALL IN MANCHESTER
text: He had not only pleaded guilty, but had expressed his intention of repeating his escapade in other directions as soon as circumstances permitted. Throughout the trial, he was busy examining a small model of the Free Trade Hall in Manchester.
